tasks.title: Establish the permanent PolitiViral sender domain in Resend
tasks.description: Make no-reply@politiviral.com the long-term verified auth sender by upgrading/freeing the account's domain slot or otherwise enabling politiviral.com in Resend.
tasks.notes: Current Resend plan only allows one sending domain and already uses byoroofer.com. A temporary fallback sender is live, so this is now a branding/trust blocker rather than an auth-outage blocker.

tasks.title: Verify all auth email flows after sender fix
tasks.description: Run the live auth email checklist for signup, magic link, password reset, invite, email change, and reauthentication once sender delivery is stable.
tasks.notes: Route checks and signup smoke testing passed on 2026-03-24 after the temporary sender switch. On 2026-03-25, signup/login/reset runtime hardening was deployed after fixing malformed Vercel public env values. Magic link, reset, invite, email change, and reauthentication still need live verification.

tasks.title: Decide temporary fallback sender strategy
tasks.description: If politiviral.com cannot be added to Resend immediately, decide whether to use no-reply@byoroofer.com temporarily or disable the hook until the sender domain can be verified.
tasks.notes: Completed by switching the live sender to PolitiViral <no-reply@byoroofer.com> so branded auth emails can deliver through the verified Resend domain.

tasks.title: Bring secondary marketing pages up to homepage quality
tasks.description: Apply the stronger homepage design system to /for-campaigns, /for-creators, and /pricing so the whole marketing surface feels consistent.
tasks.notes: Homepage quality is ahead of the supporting marketing pages.

tasks.title: Replace mock marketing assets with real product proof
tasks.description: Add real product screenshots, creator examples, testimonials, and campaign proof points where available to strengthen conversion and trust.
tasks.notes: Current creator cards and product mockups are polished placeholders but not final market-proof assets.

tasks.title: Initialize project-memory system
tasks.description: Create the canonical repo-backed JSON memory structure and capture current project status.

tasks.title: Rotate exposed Supabase and Resend credentials
tasks.description: Replace the Supabase and Resend credentials that were shared interactively during live troubleshooting once auth email delivery is stable.
tasks.notes: Do not store replacement secrets in repo-backed memory.

tasks.title: Clean malformed Vercel public env values at the source
tasks.description: Update the Vercel production values for NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_DEFAULT_KEY so they no longer include embedded newline characters.
tasks.notes: The deployed code now trims malformed values and uses direct static NEXT_PUBLIC_* reads, but the Vercel dashboard values should still be corrected to prevent future regressions.
